overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character in ancient Egyptian attire exploring an elaborate indoor temple or library. The character ascends a grand marble staircase, passes a large statue, walks through corridors lined with study tables and papyrus scrolls, examines a lattice window, and explores the great hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand marble staircase with statue landing

events.description: character begins ascending the wide marble staircase
NPC descends past the character on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking up the grand marble staircase toward the robed statue at the landing

notable_agents.action: male figure in white tunic descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with carved balustrades and shallow steps
tall statue of a robed figure holding a staff at the stair landing
ornate carved pillars with spiral patterns and decorative capitals
geometric patterned window high on the wall letting in natural light

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand marble staircase within an ancient Egyptian temple. A large robed statue stands at the landing above, while ornate fluted columns line the sides. Natural light filters through a high lattice window as the character passes an NPC descending the stairs.

events.description: passing the large robed statue at the stair landing
entering the covered corridor with red carpet runner

agents.ego_description: continuing up the secondary stairs past the statue and into the upper corridor

entered.detail: ornate red and gold patterned carpet running along the floor

segments.scene_description: The character passes the imposing robed statue and continues ascending a secondary staircase. The environment transitions into a more enclosed corridor where a red carpet runner begins. The fluted columns now appear closer as the character moves into the upper level.

events.description: character slows slightly while passing NPCs at the study table
passing stacks of bundled papyrus scrolls stacked against the left wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the corridor past study tables laden with scrolls and writing materials

notable_agents.action: two individuals examining documents at a high wooden table

entered.detail: long dark wooden tables with papyrus scrolls and writing implements
simple wooden stools with curved legs placed at the tables
bundled scrolls stacked in neat piles against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a corridor functioning as a scriptorium or library. Long study tables line the right side, covered with papyrus scrolls and writing materials, while bundled scrolls stack against the left wall. Two NPCs stand examining documents at a table as the character passes.

events.description: character stops at the lattice window to look outside
character turns around to walk back through the hall

agents.ego_description: pausing at the lattice window to look outside, then turning back to explore

entered.detail: large square lattice window with blue and gold geometric frame

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a large lattice window set into the left wall, pausing to look out through the geometric screen. After a moment of observation, the character turns around to walk back through the hall, with warm natural light streaming through the window.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall with multiple study areas

events.description: turning back into the main hall revealing the vaulted ceiling
character turns to survey the room and examine the architecture

agents.ego_description: walking back through the great hall and examining the study areas and architecture

entered.detail: high arched ceiling with geometric patterns and decorative coffers
large decorative wall hangings with figures in ancient Egyptian style

segments.scene_description: The character explores the spacious great hall, revealing the full height of the vaulted ceiling with its intricate geometric patterns. Wall tapestries depicting figures hang on the left, while rows of study tables extend into the distance. The character surveys the architecture while walking along the red carpet.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a grand temple staircase into the scholarly depths of an expansive ancient library. It begins with the character climbing marble stairs flanked by fluted columns, passing a descending NPC as natural light filters through a high lattice window. As the character passes an imposing robed statue at the landing, the scene shifts into a more enclosed upper corridor marked by the start of a red carpet runner. The camera then follows the character through a scriptorium lined with papyrus scrolls and study tables where NPCs examine documents, before pausing at a geometric lattice window to look outside. Finally, the character turns back to explore the vast great hall, where the view expands to reveal towering vaulted ceilings, hanging tapestries, and long rows of tables stretching into the distance.
